channel.title: About InnerSource Commons on InnerSource Commons
channel.description: Recent content in About InnerSource Commons on InnerSource Commons

item.title: Contact Us
item.description: The quickest and best way to reach us is to join Slack and ask your question in the #general channel.

item.title: InnerSource Commons Code of Conduct
item.description: Our Pledge We pledge to make our community welcoming, safe, and equitable for all. We are committed to fostering an environment that respects and promotes the dignity, rights, and contributions of all individuals, regardless of characteristics including race, ethnicity, caste, color, age, physical characteristics, neurodiversity, disability, sex or gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, language, philosophy or religion, national or social origin, socio-economic position, level of education, or other status.

item.title: Members
item.description: The InnerSource Commons (ISC) community is open to all. Some community participants go above and beyond, and may be invited to become an ISC Member.

item.title: Our Sponsors
item.description: Our Partners Analog Devices “At Analog Devices, we believe strongly in the power of InnerSource to accelerate innovation and improve developer experience.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: InnerSource Commons is an independent non-for-profit organisation that creates and shares knowledge about InnerSource for its members.
